description: Go program where language.Parse() only exists in a test helper file (helpers_test.go). Production code in main.go never calls Parse(). CVE-2022-32149 should be not_affected since the vulnerable function is only used in dev/test code.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: language.Parse() only appears in helpers_test.go which is excluded from production builds. main.go contains no vulnerable function calls.

findings.human_justification: language.Parse() is only called in helpers_test.go, a Go test file excluded from production binaries. The production main.go has no reference to the vulnerable function.
